title: CrowdStrike scanner blocking n8n image uploads
symptom: When attempting to upload n8n Docker images >= 1.123.23, the CrowdStrike scanner returns a 400 error, blocking deployment.
applies_when: CrowdStrike Falcon Container Scanner is in use
root_cause: The CrowdStrike Falcon Container Scanner is rejecting the newer n8n images due to a Go pseudo-version string that does not conform to strict semantic versioning, causing the scanner's JSON validator to fail.
fix_steps: File a bug report with CrowdStrike on their GitHub repo regarding the SBOM validator issue.
Consider allowlisting the n8n image in the CrowdStrike scanner settings.
Alternatively, strip the Go module metadata from the image before scanning.
agent_instruction: File a bug report with CrowdStrike and consider allowlisting the n8n image.
